## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.38

### Camera WebRTC
- Continues prerelease camera testing with APK-aligned WebRTC signaling, reconnect handling, and data-channel command flow.
- Aligns live-view resolution selection with the Android app, including supported-resolution list handling and unknown resolution values.
- Keeps camera debug output focused on SDP, signaling, candidate, and data-channel state needed for follow-up camera reports.
